Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants versus variants that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the time of Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in overlapping process paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE when the subsequent path includes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that complete within two months of submission versus those that exceed this period
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that avoid any rejection by PRE_APPROVER

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where both activities occur

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION when followed directly by Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR versus when followed by Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER

Name: Total time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that originate from domestic declarations versus pre-paid travel costs

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include a prior rejection by ADMINISTRATION versus those without prior rejections
